M5I_PREVNT_SKIN_CARE (M5I) Other Preventative or Protective Skin Care CHAR 1 Skin condition: skin treatments in last 7 days - other preventative/protective skin care other than to feet. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
431 M5J M5J_NONE_ABOVE (M5J) None of Above Skin Treatments CHAR 1 Skin condition: skin treatments in last 7 days - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
432 M6A M6A_FOOT_PROB (M6A) Resident Has 1 or More Foot Problems CHAR 1 Skin condition: foot problems and care in last
